title: One Piece
author: Eiichiro Oda
description: A young pirate and his crew sail the seas in search of the legendary One Piece treasure.

title: Naruto
author: Masashi Kishimoto
description: A determined ninja works to earn recognition and become the leader of his village.

title: Bleach
author: Tite Kubo
description: A teenager gains the powers of a Soul Reaper and battles spirits that threaten the living world.

title: Dragon Ball
author: Akira Toriyama
description: Goku trains, explores, and fights powerful rivals while protecting Earth.

title: My Hero Academia
author: Kohei Horikoshi
description: A boy born without powers enters a hero academy after inheriting a legendary quirk.

title: Demon Slayer
author: Koyoharu Gotouge
description: A kind swordsman hunts demons while searching for a cure for his sister.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
author: Gege Akutami
description: A student joins a school for sorcerers after becoming host to a dangerous curse.

title: Attack on Titan
author: Hajime Isayama
description: Humanity fights for survival behind walls while uncovering the truth about Titans.

title: Kingdom
author: Yasuhisa Hara
description: An orphan dreams of becoming a great general during China's Warring States era.

title: Berserk
author: Kentaro Miura
description: A lone mercenary struggles through betrayal, war, and supernatural horror.

title: Vagabond
author: Takehiko Inoue
description: A fictionalized journey follows Miyamoto Musashi as he seeks strength and purpose.

title: Vinland Saga
author: Makoto Yukimura
description: A young warrior's revenge quest grows into a search for peace and a new land.

title: Monster
author: Naoki Urasawa
description: A surgeon pursues a former patient whose life he saved and whose crimes haunt him.

title: 20th Century Boys
author: Naoki Urasawa
description: Childhood memories become clues in a conspiracy that threatens the world.

title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
author: Kanehito Yamada
description: An elf mage reflects on time, friendship, and loss after the hero's journey ends.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist
author: Hiromu Arakawa
description: Two brothers seek the Philosopher's Stone after an alchemy experiment goes wrong.

title: Hunter x Hunter
author: Yoshihiro Togashi
description: A boy becomes a Hunter to find his father and enters a world of dangerous trials.

title: Haikyu!!
author: Haruichi Furudate
description: A short but passionate volleyball player aims for the national stage with his team.

title: Kaguya-sama: Love Is War
author: Aka Akasaka
description: Two brilliant student council leaders turn romance into a battle of pride.

title: Spy x Family
author: Tatsuya Endo
description: A spy, an assassin, and a telepath form a fake family with very real secrets.

title: Sailor Moon
author: Naoko Takeuchi
description: A schoolgirl becomes a guardian of love and justice with her fellow Sailor Guardians.

title: Fruits Basket
author: Natsuki Takaya
description: An orphaned girl discovers a family cursed to transform into zodiac animals.

title: Ouran High School Host Club
author: Bisco Hatori
description: A scholarship student is pulled into the antics of an elite school's host club.

title: Kimi ni Todoke
author: Karuho Shiina
description: A shy girl slowly makes friends and finds love after years of being misunderstood.

title: Nana
author: Ai Yazawa
description: Two young women named Nana become roommates while chasing love, music, and independence.

title: Paradise Kiss
author: Ai Yazawa
description: A student enters the world of fashion design and questions her planned future.

title: Chihayafuru
author: Yuki Suetsugu
description: A girl pursues competitive karuta while navigating friendship and ambition.

title: Nodame Cantabile
author: Tomoko Ninomiya
description: Two music students with opposite personalities grow through performance and romance.

title: Yona of the Dawn
author: Mizuho Kusanagi
description: A sheltered princess becomes a fugitive and seeks allies to reclaim her strength.

title: Skip Beat!
author: Yoshiki Nakamura
description: A betrayed girl enters show business to reinvent herself and prove her talent.

title: Blue Period
author: Tsubasa Yamaguchi
description: A high school student discovers painting and commits himself to the world of art.

title: A Silent Voice
author: Yoshitoki Oima
description: A former bully seeks redemption and reconnection with a deaf classmate.

title: March Comes in Like a Lion
author: Chica Umino
description: A young shogi player learns to live with grief, pressure, and found family.

title: Death Note
author: Tsugumi Ohba
description: A genius student uses a supernatural notebook while matching wits with a detective.

title: Chainsaw Man
author: Tatsuki Fujimoto
description: A poor devil hunter merges with his chainsaw devil companion and joins public safety.
